auth.loginSubtitle: Login to your AI Agent workflow management platform.
auth.brandTitle: Build, manage and observe AI Agent workflows visually.
auth.brandSubtitle: FlowOps orchestrates models, knowledge bases, tools and business systems into reusable agent workflows, helping teams ship stable and traceable AI automation.
auth.brandPointOrder: Design agents, tools, knowledge and branches on a visual canvas
auth.brandPointSystems: Connect APIs, databases, documents and internal systems
auth.brandPointTrust: Track workflow runs end to end for governance and iteration
auth.signInWithAuth0: Sign In With Auth0 by Okta
auth.verificationEmailSent: Verification email has been sent successfully.
auth.displayNameHint: Is used for display purposes only.
auth.emailHint: Kindly use a valid email address. Will be used as login id.
auth.inviteCodeHint: Please copy the token you would have received in your email.
auth.passwordRule: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character.
auth.confirmPasswordHint: Confirm your password. Must match the password typed above.
auth.accountSetupLocalNotice: Account setup does not make any external connections, your data stays securely on your locally hosted server.

auth.registerCloudError: Error in registering user. Please try again.
auth.registerOrganizationFailed: Error in registering organization. Please contact your administrator. ({{message}})
auth.registrationSuccessful: Registration Successful. You will be redirected to the sign in page shortly.
auth.registrationVerifyEmail: To complete your registration, please click on the verification link we sent to your email address
auth.rateLimitTooManyRequests: You're making a lot of requests. Please wait and try again later.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to sign in
errors.invitedUser: This invited user has not registered yet

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordMaxLength: Password must not be more than 128 characters
auth.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
auth.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit
auth.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.forgotEmailHint: If you forgot the email you used for signing up, please contact your administrator.
auth.resetInstructionsSent: Password reset instructions sent to the email.
auth.resetInstructionsFailed: Failed to send instructions, please contact your administrator.
auth.resetTokenHint: Please copy the token you received in your email.
auth.passwordsDoNotMatch: New Password and Confirm Password do not match.
auth.licenseExpiredDesc: Please contact our support team to renew your license.
auth.rateLimitedDesc: You have made too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait {{seconds}}s before trying again.
auth.noPagePermission: You do not have permission to access this page.

landing.heroSubtitle: FlowOps lets your team visually orchestrate AI agents, knowledge bases and business systems — turning repetitive manual processes into stable, traceable and reusable automation.
landing.chatBubble1: Hi, I can help you orchestrate workflows and connect knowledge bases and business systems.
landing.chatBubble2: Auto-classify these tickets and follow up by priority.
landing.chatBubble3: Automation created: ticket triage → knowledge match → auto-reply, with low-confidence handoff to a human.
landing.featuresTitle: Turn AI into reliable business automation
landing.featuresSubtitle: From agent orchestration and knowledge retrieval to process automation and human fallback — help teams turn high-frequency work into standardized, traceable, reusable capabilities.
landing.featureAgentDesc: Visually compose LLMs, tools and business actions into AI agents that get things done.
landing.featureWorkflowDesc: Orchestrate lookups, approvals, outreach and notifications into stable, reusable automations.
landing.featureKnowledgeDesc: Capture enterprise docs, rules and FAQs, grounding answers with vector retrieval.
landing.featureTrustDesc: Prioritize deterministic data for critical questions, with moderation and low-confidence fallback to reduce errors.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to launch your AI automation with FlowOps?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Log in to the console to start building your agents, workflows and knowledge bases.

chatConfig.languageDescription: The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in ISO-639-1 format will improve accuracy and latency.
chatConfig.sttPromptDescription: An optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment. The prompt should match the audio language.
chatConfig.temperatureDescription: The sampling temperature, between 0 and 1. Higher values like 0.8 make output more random, while lower values like 0.2 make it more focused and deterministic.
chatConfig.localAiBaseUrlDescription: The base URL of the local AI server
chatConfig.sttModelDescription: The STT model to load. Defaults to whisper-1 if left blank.
chatConfig.groqSttModelDescription: The STT model to load. Defaults to whisper-large-v3 if left blank.
chatConfig.recognitionLanguageDescription: The recognition language, for example en-US or es-ES.
chatConfig.profanityFilterModeDescription: How to handle profanity in the transcription
chatConfig.audioChannelsDescription: Comma-separated list of audio channels to process, for example 0,1.
chatConfig.ttsVoiceDescription: The voice to use when generating the audio
chatConfig.elevenLabsVoiceDescription: The voice to use for text-to-speech
chatConfig.followUpPromptDescription: Prompt to generate questions based on the conversation history. You can use variable {history} to refer to the conversation history.
chatConfig.followUpDefaultPrompt: Given the following conversations: {history}. Please help me predict the three most likely questions that human would ask and keep each question short and concise.
chatConfig.ollamaBaseUrlDescription: Base URL of your Ollama instance
chatConfig.ollamaModelNameDescription: Name of the Ollama model to use

api.scheduledTriggerNotice: This flow is configured as a Scheduled Trigger. It is fired automatically by the in-process scheduler on its cron schedule and cannot be invoked via the prediction API. To call this flow from an API, change the Start node Input Type to Chat Input, Form Input, or Webhook Trigger.

assistants.title: Assistants
assistants.description: Chat assistants with instructions, tools, and files to respond to user queries
assistants.cardCustomDesc: Create custom assistant using your choice of LLMs
assistants.cardOpenAIDesc: Create assistant using OpenAI Assistant API. This option is being deprecated; consider using Custom Assistant instead.
assistants.customAssistantCreateFailed: Failed to add new Custom Assistant: {{message}}
assistants.openAIDescription: Create assistants using OpenAI Assistant API
assistants.assistantNameHelp: The name of the assistant. The maximum length is 256 characters.
assistants.assistantDescriptionHelp: The description of the assistant. The maximum length is 512 characters.
assistants.assistantDescriptionPlaceholder: Description of what the Assistant does
assistants.assistantInstructionHelp: The system instructions that the assistant uses. The maximum length is 32768 characters.
assistants.assistantInstructionPlaceholder: You are a personal math tutor. When asked a question, write and run Python code to answer the question.
assistants.assistantTemperatureHelp: Controls randomness: lower values produce less random completions. As temperature approaches zero, the model becomes more deterministic and repetitive.
assistants.assistantTopPHelp: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered.
assistants.assistantToolsHelp: A list of tools enabled on the assistant. There can be a maximum of 128 tools per assistant.
assistants.codeInterpreterHelp: Code Interpreter enables the assistant to write and run code. This tool can process files with diverse data and formatting, and generate files such as graphs.
assistants.fileSearchHelp: File search gives the assistant knowledge from files that you or your users upload. Once a file is uploaded, the assistant decides when to retrieve content based on user requests.
assistants.vectorStoreAddFailed: Failed to add new Vector Store: {{message}}

custom.mandatoryFields: Please fill in all mandatory fields.
custom.generateInstructionsDescription: You can generate a prompt template by sharing basic details about your task.
custom.embedApiTitle: Embed in website or use as API
custom.knowledgeDocumentStoresHelp: Give your assistant context about different document sources. Document stores must be upserted in advance.
custom.describeKnowledgeHelp: Describe what the knowledge base is about, so the AI knows when and how to search for correct information.
custom.returnSourceDocumentsHelp: Return the actual source documents that were used to answer the question.
custom.toolsHelp: Tools are actions that your assistant can perform
custom.docStoreDescriptionGenerated: Document Store Tool Description generated successfully

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: External functions or APIs the agent can use to take action
tools.toolNameHelp: Tool name must use lowercase letters and underscores, for example: my_tool.
tools.toolDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what the tool does so the model knows when to use it.
tools.toolDescriptionHelp: Describe what the tool does so the model can decide when to call it.
tools.inputSchemaHelp: Define the JSON input fields this tool expects.
tools.javascriptFunctionHelp: Function to execute when the tool is used. You can use Input Schema fields as variables, for example $userid. The return value must be a string. You can also override the code through the API by following this guide.
tools.exampleCommentLibraries: You can use any libraries imported in FlowOps
tools.exampleCommentSchemaVariables: Use properties from Input Schema as variables, for example: property userid becomes $userid
tools.exampleCommentReturnString: The function must return a string
tools.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format. Please check your input.
tools.invalidJsonArray: Input must be an array of properties

documentStores.recordManagerWarning: Note: Without a Record Manager configured, only the document chunks will be removed from the document store. evaluations.customEvaluatorsDescription: Post execution, all the chosen evaluators will be executed on the results. Each evaluator will grade the results based on the criteria defined and return a pass/fail indicator.
evaluations.gradeWithLlmDescription: Post execution, grades the answers by using an LLM. Used to generate comparative scores, reasoning, or other custom defined criteria.

evaluators.title: Evaluators
evaluators.outputSchemaHelp: What is the output format in JSON?
evaluators.promptRuntimeValues: You can use {{question}} {{actualOutput}} {{expectedOutput}} to inject runtime values into your prompt.
evaluators.llmJsonOutputHelp: Instruct the LLM to give formatted JSON output

optionDescriptions.containsAny: Returns true if any of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.
optionDescriptions.containsAll: Returns true if ALL of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.
optionDescriptions.doesNotContainAny: Returns true if none of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.
optionDescriptions.doesNotContainAll: Returns true if not all of the specified comma separated values are present in the response.
optionDescriptions.startsWith: Returns true if the response starts with the specified value.
optionDescriptions.notStartsWith: Returns true if the response does not start with the specified value.
optionDescriptions.isValidJson: Returns true if the response is a valid JSON.
optionDescriptions.isNotValidJson: Returns true if the response is not a valid JSON.
optionDescriptions.totalTokens: Sum of Prompt Tokens and Completion Tokens.
optionDescriptions.promptTokens: This is the number of tokens in your prompt.
optionDescriptions.completionTokens: Completion tokens are any tokens that the model generates in response to your input.
optionDescriptions.apiLatency: Total time taken for the FlowOps Prediction API call (milliseconds).
optionDescriptions.chatflowLatency: Actual time spent executing the chatflow (milliseconds).
optionDescriptions.responseLength: Number of characters in the response.
optionDescriptions.evaluateText: Set of Evaluators to evaluate the result of a Chatflow.
optionDescriptions.evaluateJson: Set of Evaluators to evaluate the JSON response of a Chatflow.
optionDescriptions.evaluateNumeric: Set of Evaluators that evaluate the metrics (latency, tokens, cost, length of response) of a Chatflow.
optionDescriptions.llmGrading: Post execution, grades the answers by using an LLM.
